# Shadow Scales
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Shadow%20Scales&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Shadow Scales
| desc = A cloak woven from the light-manipulating scales of the Shadowscale.
| slot = cloak
| tier = ST

| cost = 95
| cooldown = 6
| feedp = 500
| fameb = 5

| bonuses = {{Stat|hp|50}} {{Stat|mp|50}} {{Stat|att|5}} {{Stat|spd|5}} 

| effects = yes
| invisible = 5
| speedy = 5

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Shadowscale]].
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavCloaks}}
[[Category:Cloaks]]
</noinclude>
